entries.stdout: Project initialized with 3 linked providers, 2 complete services, and 1 complete plan.
entries.reasoning_summary: Used the authoritative CLI status output to summarize exact provisioning progress.

entries.stdout: Railway/postgres complete; PostHog/analytics complete; Chroma linked but blocked on billing confirmation; Vercel/project blocked on additional provider verification.
entries.reasoning_summary: This is the current production-readiness gap analysis for the selected service stack.

entries.stdout: Prepare a new progress commit containing updated session transcript state.
entries.reasoning_summary: There were no remaining uncommitted app changes in the codex subtree, so the next material change to record is the updated provisioning status.

decisions: Use transcript objects as the minimal durable change when the code subtree is otherwise clean but the external provisioning state has changed.
Do not commit provider secrets, .env files, or vault contents.
Keep reporting exact service states from Stripe Projects rather than inferred deployment readiness.
